flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Broward College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Broward College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (33.1% → 39.1%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Broward College rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 (64.0% → 74.6%).
